items.title: National Level Workshop on Blockchain Technology
items.desc: A 2-day national level workshop exploring blockchain fundamentals, smart contracts, and decentralized applications for engineering students.

items.title: Workshop on Machine Learning & AI
items.desc: Hands-on sessions covering supervised learning, neural networks, and deployment of ML models in real-world scenarios.

items.title: CATIA V5 & Solid Works Training
items.desc: Industry-standard CAD software training for Mechanical and Aeronautical engineering students with live project sessions.

items.title: PCB Design & Embedded Systems Workshop
items.desc: Practical workshop on designing printed circuit boards and programming embedded microcontrollers using Arduino and Raspberry Pi.

items.title: Python for Data Science Bootcamp
items.desc: 3-day intensive bootcamp covering Python programming, data analysis with Pandas, and visualization with Matplotlib.

items.title: Civil Engineering Site Visits & Workshop
items.desc: Field visits and practical sessions on construction management, site safety, and modern building technologies.

items.title: Drone Technology & UAV Workshop
items.desc: Comprehensive hands-on workshop covering drone assembly, flight mechanics, and applications in agriculture and surveillance.

items.title: Cyber Security & Ethical Hacking
items.desc: Workshop on ethical hacking techniques, network security, penetration testing, and cybersecurity best practices.
